results.summary: The interaction successfully transitions from the Command Settings view to the main menu Command Actions view upon clicking Back, but the actual before state shows incomplete rendering of settings sections compared to the expected wireframe.

correctStateChanges.expectedBefore: Visible with server, display, session, theme controls, Save Settings, Back buttons, and scrollbar
correctStateChanges.expectedAfter: Not visible, replaced by Command Actions view
correctStateChanges.actualBefore: Partially visible with server endpoint and visual palette, but missing display profile and UI scale
correctStateChanges.actualAfter: Not visible, replaced by Command Actions view
correctStateChanges.evidence: Actual after screenshot shows main menu with title, sector brief, and command actions buttons, matching expected after wireframe

correctStateChanges.expectedAfter: Visible with RiskyStars title, sector brief, command actions buttons (Multiplayer, Single Player, Tutorial Mode, Settings, Exit)
correctStateChanges.evidence: Transition from settings to main menu observed in actual screenshots
Frame persists in both actual before and after screenshots

incorrectStateChanges.expected: Visible in before state with resolution, window mode, UI scale controls
incorrectStateChanges.actual: Missing in actual before screenshot; large black space instead
incorrectStateChanges.whyIncorrect: Actual before does not show the full settings content as per wireframe, indicating potential rendering or layout issue

incorrectStateChanges.expected: Visible in before state with palette, accent color, classic green, warning tone, amber
incorrectStateChanges.actual: Partially visible but incomplete; only label shown without controls
incorrectStateChanges.whyIncorrect: Actual before screenshot shows truncated or missing details in visual palette section

incorrectStateChanges.expected: Scrollbar available and content scrollable to show all sections
incorrectStateChanges.actual: Scrollbar visible, but content appears incomplete or not fully rendered
incorrectStateChanges.whyIncorrect: Despite scrollbar, missing sections suggest content not properly loaded or screenshot not capturing scrolled state

wireframeSuitability.why: The wireframes accurately depict the expected before and after states for the transition, but lack annotations for dynamic elements like scrolling, which could help validate incomplete renderings in actual screenshots.
missingRequirements: No explicit validation for screenshot dimensions (TR-UI-INTERACTION-HWND-001) in wireframes
recommendedWireframeChanges: Add annotations indicating scrollable areas and full content extent
Include dimension labels to match technical requirements for screenshot size

results.summary: The actual UI transitions from the main menu to the settings view as expected, but the after state is incomplete, missing several sections like Display Profile and UI Scale compared to the wireframe. The outer frame remains consistent.

correctStateChanges.evidence: Title present in before images, absent in after images
Brief text present in before, replaced in after

correctStateChanges.expectedBefore: Visible on the right with buttons
correctStateChanges.actualBefore: Visible on the right with buttons
correctStateChanges.evidence: Panel and buttons present in before, absent in after
Section appears in after images matching wireframe
Frame remains consistent across before and after images

incorrectStateChanges.expected: Visible in after state with resolution, window mode
incorrectStateChanges.whyIncorrect: The full Command Settings view should include Display Profile, but it is missing, resulting in incomplete transition

incorrectStateChanges.expected: Visible in after state with slider
incorrectStateChanges.whyIncorrect: Expected UI Scale controls are absent, indicating incomplete settings view

incorrectStateChanges.expected: Positioned below UI Scale with full controls
incorrectStateChanges.actual: Appears directly after empty space following Server Endpoint, partially matching but out of order due to missing sections
incorrectStateChanges.whyIncorrect: Position and context incorrect due to missing preceding sections

incorrectStateChanges.expected: Full settings content fitting without excessive empty space at 1536x832
incorrectStateChanges.actual: Large empty space between sections, suggesting missing content or layout issue
incorrectStateChanges.whyIncorrect: Layout does not match wireframe dimensions and content density

wireframeSuitability.why: The before and after wireframes accurately depict the expected states, including all required elements and transitions, allowing effective validation against the functional and technical requirements.

results.summary: The interaction transitions from the Command Settings view to the Command Actions view upon clicking Save Settings, but the actual before state is incomplete compared to the expected wireframe, missing several sections and details.

correctStateChanges.expectedBefore: Visible at the top of the settings view
correctStateChanges.expectedAfter: Not visible, replaced by main menu title
correctStateChanges.evidence: Title present in actual before screenshot, absent in after; matches transition to Command Actions view
Button present in actual before, absent in after, indicating successful transition
Button present in actual before, absent in after

correctStateChanges.expectedAfter: Visible at the top of the main menu
correctStateChanges.evidence: Title absent in actual before, present in after, matching expected transition

correctStateChanges.expectedAfter: Visible on the right side (MULTIPLAYER, SINGLE PLAYER, etc.)
correctStateChanges.evidence: Buttons absent in before, present in after, confirming view switch
Text absent in before, present in after
Scrollbar present in before, absent in after

incorrectStateChanges.expected: Visible in before state with Resolution, Window Mode, UI Scale
incorrectStateChanges.actual: Missing entirely in actual before screenshot
incorrectStateChanges.whyIncorrect: The actual before state does not include the Display Profile section, which is present in the expected wireframe, indicating incomplete implementation or rendering issue

incorrectStateChanges.expected: Includes Palette, Accent Color, Classic Green, Warning Tone, Amber
incorrectStateChanges.actual: Only shows 'Palette' without additional color options
incorrectStateChanges.whyIncorrect: Incomplete content in Visual Palette section in actual before compared to expected

incorrectStateChanges.expected: Plain black with bubble effects in wireframes
incorrectStateChanges.actual: Starry space background in both before and after screenshots
incorrectStateChanges.whyIncorrect: Background differs from wireframe, potentially due to actual rendering, but may affect visual validation

incorrectStateChanges.expected: Session and theme controls should be visible in before state as per prompt
incorrectStateChanges.actual: Not visible or incomplete in actual before
incorrectStateChanges.whyIncorrect: Prompt mentions session and theme, but actual before lacks distinct sections for them

wireframeSuitability.why: The wireframes accurately depict the intended transition from settings to main menu, but the before wireframe includes elements (e.g., full Display Profile, detailed Visual Palette) not present in the actual implementation, making it partially suitable for validation. The after wireframe matches well. Background differences reduce fidelity.
missingRequirements: Distinct session settings section not depicted in before wireframe despite prompt mention
Theme controls are implied in Visual Palette but not explicitly separated
recommendedWireframeChanges: Update before wireframe to reflect current implementation state or add variants for partial implementations
Incorporate actual starry background for better visual matching
Add explicit session settings section to before wireframe to match prompt description
